title: LongTermMemoryRecord
description: JSON Schema defining canonical structure for LLM Agent System (LAS) memory records.

id.description: Unique identifier of the memory record, typically hashed or prefixed.

session_id.description: Identifier of the conversation or project session that generated the memory.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 formatted UTC timestamp of memory creation.

source.description: The generator or module that authored the memory (e.g. 'memory_limit_hook', 'semantic_extraction').

source_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the source data used for deduplication.

summary.description: The human-readable summary, fact description, or user preference.

keywords.description: Searchable keywords extracted from the memory content.

message_count.description: Number of conversation messages summarized in this memory (0 for semantic/preference/handoff).

payload.description: Detailed payload containing raw message chunks, structured task graphs, or state metadata.

domain.description: The taxonomy domain of the memory.

confidence.description: Factual reliability/confidence score of the memory record.

citations.description: Task IDs, URLs, or file path references citing the source of the memory.

expires_at.description: Optional ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of memory expiration.

privacy_level.description: Privacy scope defining visibility of this memory.
